intent: No source file over 500 lines (God file) — split it.
No function over 60 lines (God function) — decompose it.
The dependency surface must not grow silently (S1) — each new dep is a deliberate re-baseline.
Every declared dep must resolve in the lockfile (S2) — no hallucinated / slopsquatted package.
No `any` type — don't switch off the type system (TS1). This codebase is JS; the gate keeps it at 0 so a future .ts addition can't sneak one in.
No @ts-ignore / @ts-nocheck directive — don't disable the checker (TS3); prefer @ts-expect-error.

The gate guards itself (M1): this config + baseline may only move forward (stricter) vs HEAD — worktree view, for CI / `npm test` where the working tree is what's under review. ARCH_ALLOW_RELAX=1 for a deliberate, reviewed loosening.
M1, staged view: in the pre-commit hook, check what is actually being COMMITTED (the index), closing the stage-a-relaxation-then-revert-the-working-file trick. Trivial (0) when nothing is staged.
